next_step.description: Plan next chunk after loop 20
next_step.rationale: The first 20 loops established strong foundations in platform stability, component logic, and validation infrastructure. However, the fragmented approach to route calculation and the lack of integrated gameplay means we have parts but no whole. The next chunk must prioritize integration over new components, turning isolated logistics functions into a cohesive playable experience. This shift from component-building to system-integration is the natural progression toward a shippable game candidate. Reducing test time and adding UI will enable faster iteration and player feedback, which are prerequisites for meaningful monetization experiments.
